zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Swinburne於大約1270年出生在英國諾圖波藍德可哈姆時，她的父親Adam de Swynburne34歲，母親Margaret de Graham29歲。她與Roger de Héron結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年在英國諾圖波藍德福特享年57歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德班包。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Swinburne于大约1270年出生在英国諾圖波藍德可哈姆时，她的父亲Adam de Swynburne34岁，母亲Margaret de Graham29岁。她与Roger de Héron结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年在英国諾圖波藍德福特享年57岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德班包。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swinburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Swinburne was born about 1270, in Hexham, Northumberland, England, her father, Adam de Swynburne, was 34 and her mother, Margaret de Graham, was 29. She married Roger de Héron. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1326, in Ford, Northumberland, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Bamburgh, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Swinburne est née environ 1270, à Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Swynburne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Graham, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Héron. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1326, à Ford, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Bamburgh, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Swinburne um 1270 in Hexham, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Swynburne 34 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Graham 29. Sie hat Roger de Héron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1326 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Ford, Northumberland, England und wurde in Bamburgh, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Swinburne è nata il circa 1270 nel Hexham, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Adam de Swynburne, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Graham, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Héron. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1326, nel Ford, Northumberland, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Bamburgh, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Swinburneが約1270年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムで生まれた時，父Adam de Swynburneは34歳，母Margaret de Grahamは29歳であった。Roger de Héronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1326年にイギリスノースウンバーランドフォードで57歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドバンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Swinburne(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Swynburne(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Graham(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Roger de Héron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 영국 노르스벌랜드 포드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 바버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Swinburne nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Swynburne, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Graham, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Héron. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1326, em Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Bamburgh, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Swinburne родилась около 1270 г. в местности хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam de Swynburne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Graham, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Héron. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1326 г. в местности форд, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности бамбург, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Swinburne nació aproximadamente 1270, en Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Swynburne, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret de Graham, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Roger de Héron. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1326, en Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Bamburgh, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
